success_factors: Workflow completed end-to-end with status=success across all planned nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Low intrusiveness risk and import-mode adapter strategy enabled non-invasive MCP wrapping.
MCP plugin started healthy over stdio, indicating runnable generated service scaffold.
Repository was successfully ingested via zip fallback despite non-ideal analysis path.
failure_reasons: DeepWiki analysis failed (external analysis subsystem), reducing semantic coverage for endpoint discovery.
Original project tests were effectively non-validated (passed=false, empty details, zero execution), limiting confidence in behavioral correctness.
Generated metadata appears inconsistent (tool_endpoints=0 vs discovered endpoints makeExtension/scandir), indicating reporting/generation quality gap.

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully; exact per-node timing unavailable. Repository is small (11 files), so download overhead is likely low.
node_performance.analysis_time: Completed with partial quality degradation (DeepWiki failure, no entry points detected initially). Static/AST-derived fallback still extracted setup.py functions.
node_performance.generation_time: Completed successfully; 7 MCP files generated with import adapter and runnable entrypoint.
node_performance.test_time: MCP health/run checks passed; original project test validation was effectively absent, so test phase quality is weak.
